violations.text: Handwashing sink at the bar was observed on the ground and disconnected. Establishment is to connect hand sink and send proof of installation to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Wood is used in the construction of the ice well stand, and walls in the bar area (behind all equipment and sinks). Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The floor in the back entrance area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
